title: bauhinia decandra
intro: Bauhinia decandra, also known as Bauhinia or Butea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and ulcers. Bauhinia decandra is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be found in various Ayurvedic and Unani medicine formulations.
